历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 11536 → 10281 → 11678 → 32316 → 21830, showing drastic fluctuations. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao with batch merging, there was a significant drop (32316), but in 2025 it rebounded to 21830, a recovery of about 10486 places, indicating that candidates' recognition of the university's Physics Category is recovering. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 21830. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou was 10 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 49 in 2025, showing continuous substantial expansion. The 2026 plan is 49, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, which has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2025 Gaokao cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 100th, rated as average, with no significant popularity boost. Hunan Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 86–92 range in recent years, making it a mid-to-upper level comprehensive normal university nationwide. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Foreign Language and Literature received an A-, with no direct A-class disciplines corresponding to Physics Category majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, etc.), so the pulling effect of advantageous disciplines on Physics Category applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category majors include Clinical Medicine (rated as recommended in 2024), Computer Science and Technology (recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), which are attractive to high-scoring candidates. Basic normal disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry) show differentiated and wait-and-see popularity. The total number of Gaokao registrants in Guizhou in 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025, intensifying competition slightly. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, adjacent to Guizhou, offering some regional appeal to Guizhou candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale for Physics Category in Guizhou (49 in 2025), and after continuous expansion, it has stabilized, indicating a high level of attention to Guizhou students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 21830, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the total number of local candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decrease from 21830. The unchanged enrollment plan keeps the supply-demand elasticity unchanged, but the increase in candidate numbers and the slight negative reputation push the ranking down (larger number). At the same time, the inclusion of popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science provides some support for the ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 21880, with a fluctuation range of 21380–22380.

Candidates with rankings in the upper part of the range (within about 21500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc. Those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 21880) should target Tier 2 majors such as Communication Engineering, Chemistry (Normal), etc. Candidates with rankings in the lower part of the range (beyond about 22000) are advised to choose Tier 3 majors like Statistics as a safe option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 2028 → 1741 → 7187 → 3451 → 2349, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to batch mergers and other factors, there was an abnormal drop (7187), which recovered to 3451 in 2024 and further improved to 2349 in 2025, indicating a clear warming trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 2349 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 9 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 22 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 22, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, which has a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 86–92 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of national normal universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving a teacher ethics incident (a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help), which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 100th, rated as average, with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no significant heat-boosting effect. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan Normal University only had Foreign Language and Literature rated A-, with no other disciplines entering the A category, indicating a relatively small number of advantageous disciplines, which has limited pulling effect on overall application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors in 2024 was divided and wait-and-see, not high-heat. Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have stable popularity. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from the 2025 total of 297,258, indicating slightly intensified competition. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, adjacent to Guizhou Province, with close geographical distance and similar climate and dietary culture, offering some regional appeal to Guizhou candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Guizhou is moderate, with 22 History Category places in 2025, a small but stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2349, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the total number of local candidates, and a slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly decrease (increase in number) from 2349. The unchanged enrollment plan keeps the supply-demand elasticity unchanged, but the increase in candidate numbers and the slight negative reputation jointly push the ranking down slightly (number increases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 2379, with a fluctuation range of 1879–2879.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical category in Guizhou Province was 7852 in 2021 (planned enrollment of 2 students). In 2024, due to a significant expansion to 10 students, the ranking dropped sharply to 32316. In 2025, with a reduction to 8 students, the ranking rebounded to 15015. The 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged at 8 students (Clinical Medicine 4, Pharmacy 2, Preventive Medicine 2). The unchanged plan has no direct expansion or reduction effect on rankings, but the recent drastic fluctuations reflect the significant regulatory effect of changes in medical enrollment scale on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national key university under the 211 Project and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha, the capital of Hunan Province. Although not a 985 university, as a long-established comprehensive normal university, its medical department (School of Medicine) enjoys high recognition within the province and neighboring regions. Medical majors leverage the university's overall 211 platform, possessing certain competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has been continuously rising, with Clinical Medicine being particularly prominent. Hunan Normal University's School of Medicine is located on the Xianjiahu Campus in Changsha, offering clear geographical advantages. The overall enrollment scale for medical majors in Guizhou Province is limited. As a 211 university outside the province, Hunan Normal University's medical majors are highly attractive to Guizhou candidates, and it is expected that the application enthusiasm will remain high in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive analysis of historical ranking trends and the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 14865, slightly higher (more difficult to enter) than in 2025, with a fluctuation range expected between 14642 and 15088.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
